title: Billy's Aether Plus
description: The classic Aether experience with addons, quality of life features, and performance enhancing mods all on a recent version of Minecraft.
body:
<center> 

# ![Billy's Aether Plus](https://i.imgur.com/qk797aI.png) 
</center>  

# ![About](https://i.imgur.com/ppnx9L7.png)
The **Billy's Aether Plus** modpack aims to provide an awesome Aether Experience by combining the Aether with some additional mods.

We strive to keep this modpack relevant by continually keeping it up to date

# ![Help](https://i.imgur.com/2Uq5mbb.png)
You are able to add any additional mods you want yourself (if this causes any compatibility issues, feel free to ask for support in our [**Discord server**](https://discord.gg/SP3PQsynTW) and we'll try to help out).


# ![Shaders](https://i.imgur.com/xU6dZqw.png)
[**Complementary Reimagined**]([https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)) are the shaders that we went with because they had good lighting, were completely free, and, most importantly, looked good.


# ![Notable Mods](https://i.imgur.com/eP7QvfH.png)
Some other notable mods include [**The Aether**](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether), [**Deep Aether**](https://modrinth.com/mod/deep-aether), [**Aether: Lost Content**](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether-lost-content), [**Essential**](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential), [**The Aether: Redux**](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-aether-redux)

# ![Installation](https://i.imgur.com/nyiwwPm.png)
I recommend allocating additional RAM for better performance. Go with 6-8GB of ram. 

**1.** Download a launcher (We recommend [**ATLauncher**](https://atlauncher.com/downloads))

**2.** Go to the "**Packs**" tab, search for "**Billy's Aether Plus**", click "**New Instance**", and then click "**Install**"
